LanguageData.Melee_CarniButcherknife.label: 切肉刀
LanguageData.Melee_CarniButcherknife.description: 死肉活肉都容易切开的大菜刀。
LanguageData.Melee_CarniButcherknife.tools.head.label: 头部
LanguageData.Melee_CarniButcherknife.tools.edge.label: 刃部
LanguageData.Melee_CarniGardenScissors.label: 园艺剪刀
LanguageData.Melee_CarniPickax.label: 鹤嘴锄
LanguageData.Melee_CarniPickax.description: 一根用于辅助工程作业的坚固棍棒。
LanguageData.Melee_CarniPickax.tools.shaft.label: 柄部
LanguageData.Melee_CarniPickax.tools.point.label: 尖端
LanguageData.Melee_CarniProd.label: 电牛棒
LanguageData.Melee_CarniProd.description: 用电驱赶家畜的工具，当然对牛以外的生物也有效。
LanguageData.Melee_CarniProd.tools.head.label: 头部
